description_long: This is a small, single-story convenience store with a traditional Japanese architectural style, featuring a prominent blue-tiled gabled roof and beige exterior walls. The front facade includes a wooden sign with Japanese characters, a service counter with various goods, and a chalkboard sign on the sidewalk. To the right of the entrance, there is a red vending machine and a wooden sliding door, while the left side features a vending area with a beverage cooler and stacked boxes. The rear and side walls are plain, with minimal decoration except for a few utility fixtures and posters. The building sits on a concrete platform, and the overall design suggests a cozy, neighborhood-oriented shop. The structure combines wood, tile, glass, and metal elements, giving it a sturdy yet welcoming appearance.
description: A small Japanese-style convenience store with a blue-tiled roof, wooden sign, service counter, vending machines, and a cozy, neighborhood feel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden sign, service counter, chalkboard sign, and red vending machine.
description_view_1: Side view with the blue-tiled roof extending over a plain beige wall and a glimpse of the red vending machine.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simple beige wall with minimal decoration and a few utility fixtures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring a beverage cooler, stacked boxes, and a partial view of the service counter.
attribute_storefront_signage: A rectangular wooden sign with white Japanese characters is mounted above the entrance, non-illuminated, with a simple, traditional design.
attribute_display_windows: A small display window is present to the right of the entrance, framed in wood, with moderate transparency and no visible advertisements.
